activities.name: lk_get_pipeline_parameters
activities.description: Get the parameters to be used in this pipeline

oracleReaderQuery.value:
SELECT DISTINCT
  POH.POH_ID, POH.BASE_POH_ID, POH.PROJ_ID Project,os.company_name Supplier_Name,os.sup_code Supplier_Code,  
  POH.PO_NUMBER,poh.po_supp, poh.PO_issue_date Last_PO_Issue_Date,   u.unit_code,
  nvl(tc.Total_Price,0) Total_Price,  
  nvl(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_AMOUNT_USD(POH.Proj_id, SYSDATE,POH.Currency_id,tc.Total_Price),0) Total_Price_USD,  
  (select min(PO_issue_date) from  m_sys.m_po_headers where base_poh_id = poh.base_poh_id) Rev0_Issue_Date,
   decode (poh.payment_type,'MP','Milestone Progress','SV','Schedule of Value','MQ','Measured Qty',poh.payment_type) Payment_Type,---+++
  MAW.ATTP_ORDER_SEQ PPE_Seq_Nr, MAW.ATTP_DSP_PPE_CODE Prog_Pay_Event, MAW.ATTP_DSP_SHORT_DESC Short_Desc,replace(MAW.ATTP_DSP_DESCRIPTION,'|', ' ') Description, MAW.ATTP_PLAN_COMPLETION_DATE Planned_Completion_Date,
  MAW.ATTP_PAYMENT_PERCENT Prog_Pay_Percent, 
  nvl(MAW.ATTP_COST_VALUE,0)  Cost_value,
  nvl(MDR_CUST.MDR_REPORT_CUSTOM.GET_AMOUNT_USD(POH.Proj_id, SYSDATE,POH.Currency_id,MAW.ATTP_COST_VALUE),0)  Cost_value_USD,
  MAW.ATTP_PAYMENT_WEEKS PW, MAW.ATTP_PAYMENT_DATE Pred_Pay_Date, MAW.ATTP_ACTUAL_PAYMENT_DATE Actual_Pay_Date,MAW.ATTP_PAID_IND Paid,
  trunc(MAW.ATTP_PAYMENT_DATE) - trunc(sysdate) Credit_days,
  (select max(attv.short_desc) from M_Sys.M_Used_Values Uv, M_Sys.M_Attrs Att, m_sys.m_attr_values attv
     Where  Uv.Proj_Id    = poh.proj_id
      And   Uv.Attr_Id    = Att.Attr_Id
      And   Att.Attr_Code = 'PAYMENT_MODE'
      And   Uv.Pk_Id      = poh.poh_id
      And   Uv.Used_Type  = 'PO'
      And   Attv.attr_value = Uv.attr_value
      And   Rownum < 2) Payment_Mode_Oracle,
  (select max(attv.short_desc)
    From M_Sys.M_Used_Values Uv, M_Sys.M_Attrs Att, m_sys.m_attr_values attv
    Where Uv.Proj_Id    = poh.proj_id
     And   Uv.Attr_Id    = Att.Attr_Id
     And   Att.Attr_Code = 'JDE_PAY_TERMS'
     And   Uv.Pk_Id      = poh.poh_id
     And   Uv.Used_Type  = 'PO'
     And   Attv.attr_value = Uv.attr_value
     And   Rownum < 2) Payment_Term_JDE
  from m_sys.m_po_headers poh,  MVP_ATTP_WORKLOAD MAW, m_sys.m_overview_suppliers os , m_sys.m_po_total_costs tc, m_sys.m_units u
  where POH.POH_ID = MAW.PK_ID 
  --MZ and poh.po_number like :A_PO_NUM
  and poh.proj_id = ('@{pipeline().parameters.proj_id}')
  and poh.sup_id = os.sup_id 
  and tc.poh_id(+) = poh.poh_id 
  and poh.po_supp IN (
  select max(poh1.po_supp)from m_sys.m_po_headers poh1 
  where poh1.po_number =poh.po_number and poh1.proj_id = poh.proj_id --and poh1.order_type = 'PO'
  and poh1.approved_date is not null 
  group by poh1.po_number)
  and poh.currency_id = u.unit_id
  and nvl(tc.Total_Price,0) > 0 -- only PO Total above Zero Values -- Requested by Jamie 12-nov-2024
  order by poh.po_number,poh.po_supp, maw.attp_order_seq

text.value:
@concat('update [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']','
set week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
where week_end_date is NULL
and PROJECT = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')

@concat('delete from [epr].[',activity('lk_get_pipeline_parameters_2').output.firstRow.table_name,']',' where (week_end_date =
(case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ',
'''',
'Saturday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 6 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Sunday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 5  as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Monday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 4 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Tuesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 3 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Wednesday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 2 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Thursday','''',' then cast(getdate() + 1 as date)
else
case when DATENAME(WEEKDAY, getdate()) = ','''','Friday','''',' then cast(getdate() as date)
end
end
end
end
end
end
end)
or week_end_date is null)
and PROJECT = ','''',pipeline().parameters.proj_id,'''')
